name: Bare except swallows critical exceptions in retry loop

planted_issues.description: Bare `except: pass` catches all exceptions including SystemExit, KeyboardInterrupt, and MemoryError, silently swallowing them. This makes the retry loop impossible to interrupt and hides critical failures.
Magic number 3 used for retry count with no exponential backoff or jitter. Under load, all clients retry simultaneously, creating a thundering herd effect against the upstream service.

fetch_partner_feed returns None on failure instead of raising an exception. The caller process_feed checks truthiness of rows but treats None (failure) and empty list (valid empty feed) identically, losing the distinction between 'no data available' and 'upstream is down'.

clean_areas.description: Import block and logging setup are correctly structured with proper format string and appropriate log level.
